title: Canonical CV — seed user 1
extraction_payload: {"resume_text":"JANE DOE | Senior Software Engineer | San Francisco CA | jane.doe@email.com | Seven years building backend and platform systems at Series B–D startups. Primary languages Go and Python. Strong PostgreSQL, Redis, and Kafka for transactional and event-driven workloads. AWS: ECS, RDS, S3, IAM patterns; containerized services with Docker; operated and scaled Kubernetes on EKS with Terraform and Helm; Prometheus and Grafana for SLOs and on-call. Shipped REST and gRPC APIs for billing, payouts, and internal data products. Prior role as platform engineer owning CI/CD, cluster upgrades, and incident response. B.S. Computer Science. Open to senior backend, platform, and staff engineer roles remote or Bay Area."}
